case_title: DR. STEVEN BRATTESANI VS PARK VIOLA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF SEP-14-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
